overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player weaves through moderate traffic on multi-lane highways and tunnels, passing under overpasses and through graffiti-covered sections with vibrant artificial lighting.

events.description: weaving between vehicles while maintaining high speed on the highway
exiting the covered highway section into a more open urban canyon

agents.ego_description: riding a red motorcycle at high speed, aggressively weaving between cars and trucks on the multi-lane highway

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving parallel in the left lane
dark SUV maintaining speed in the right lane

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars spanning across the road
tall metal safety fence running along the right side of the highway
concrete and metal barrier separating lanes
support columns for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving a red motorcycle at high speed under massive concrete highway overpasses. The scene is artificially lit with moderate traffic surrounding the player. The camera weaves between a white sedan on the left and an SUV on the right as the environment transitions from enclosed to more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown city street with skyscrapers and billboards

events.description: emerging from underpass into open street with increased ambient city light and neon signs
crossing a yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk at an intersection
making a slight right turn onto the main thoroughfare while accelerating

agents.ego_description: navigating through downtown city streets, passing intersections and maintaining speed alongside moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: green truck ahead slowing for the intersection
black car merging into the lane from the right

entered.detail: tall modern glass building with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying colorful neon graphics
tropical palm trees lining the edge of the street
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges from the highway underpass into a wide-open downtown street lined with palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with neon colors. The player crosses a yellow striped intersection while navigating around a green truck and a merging black car.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban tunnel with vibrant graffiti and colored neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered tunnel section with blue neon ceiling lights
transitioning from blue to red neon lighting as the tunnel walls change color
approaching the tunnel exit with increasing light from the opening ahead

agents.ego_description: speeding through the enclosed tunnel section, navigating gentle curves with neon-lit walls and graffiti art

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle with glowing red tail lights ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: dark opening of the covered tunnel section ahead
blue fluorescent tube lights running along the tunnel ceiling
colorful spray paint murals and street art covering the concrete walls
large industrial ventilation fan mounted on the tunnel wall
large green tiger face painted on the blue tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle enters a narrow enclosed tunnel illuminated by vibrant blue and red neon lights. The walls are covered in colorful graffiti murals including a prominent green tiger face. The space feels industrial with visible ventilation fans and concrete surfaces, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere as the player drives toward the distant tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with overpasses in rainy night conditions

events.description: rain begins to fall visibly on the camera lens and creates wet reflections on the road
weaving sharply between slower traffic vehicles on the highway
overtaking a large truck on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: high-speed driving on the open highway in rainy conditions, aggressively overtaking vehicles and navigating through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV being overtaken on the left side
white sedan maintaining position in the center lane

entered.detail: elevated highway structure crossing overhead with support columns
visible rain droplets on the camera lens and wet reflective road surface
jersey barrier separating the highway lanes
overhead directional sign with illuminated green text

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel back into the open highway, rain begins to fall visibly on the camera lens. The player weaves aggressively through traffic, overtaking a black SUV on the left while navigating under elevated highway overpasses. The wet asphalt reflects the artificial street lights as the motorcycle approaches an overhead highway sign in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed motorcycle journey that transitions from the oppressive concrete of highway underpasses into the vibrant, open expanse of a neon-lit downtown. It begins with the red motorcycle weaving through moderate traffic, slicing between a white sedan and an SUV beneath massive concrete overpasses. As the camera pushes forward, the enclosed industrial environment gives way to a wide-open city street lined with towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The scene then expands into a brilliant display of digital billboards and neon colors as the rider crosses a yellow striped intersection. Finally, the movement culminates in a fluid navigation around a green truck and a merging black car amidst the glowing urban landscape.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a motorcycle transitions from a neon-lit industrial tunnel into a rainy, open-air highway. It begins by speeding through a narrow enclosed space where blue and red neon lights illuminate concrete walls and graffiti murals, including a prominent green tiger face. As the camera approaches the tunnel exit, the enclosed industrial atmosphere gives way to the open city air where rain begins to streak across the lens. The scene then shifts to a high-speed weave through traffic on wet asphalt, overtaking a black SUV while passing under massive elevated overpasses. Finally, the camera glides forward through the reflections of artificial street lights toward a distant overhead highway sign.
